title: Relationship Between Characteristic and Minimal Polynomials for Block Matrices
description: A visual explanation of how the characteristic and minimal polynomials of a block-diagonal matrix are determined by the polynomials of its individual blocks.
relationships: A is composed of blocks A₁ and A₂ on its diagonal
p_A(λ) is the product of p_{A₁}(λ) and p_{A₂}(λ)
m_A(λ) is the least common multiple (LCM) of m_{A₁}(λ) and m_{A₂}(λ)
